---
title: "Track: Quickstart"
page-layout: full
---

## What you’ll get from this track

- A **first successful fit** using wrapper-first functions.
- A mental model of **what objects you get back** and which S3 methods to use next.
- A clear handoff to examples once you’re unblocked.

## Prerequisites

- Comfortable running R code and installing dependencies.

## Path

1. [Start here](../start/start-here.qmd)
2. [Basic compile and run](../start/basic-model-compile-run.qmd)
3. [Backends and workflow map](../start/backends-and-workflow.qmd)
4. [Examples hub](../examples/index.qmd)
## Next steps

- If your goal is *modeling*: continue with [Track: Modeling](modeling.qmd)
- If your goal is *causal effects*: continue with [Track: Causal](causal.qmd)

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Start Here](../start/start-here.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
